1.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
1.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

3.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

4.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

4.gl: to procreate (properly, of the father, but by extension of the mother); figuratively, to regenerate
4.kj: bear, beget, be born, bring forth, conceive, be delivered of, gender, make, spring

5.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

10.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;
feminine of a derivative of G4990 (σωτήρ) as (properly, abstract) noun;

10.gl: properly, royalty, i.e. (abstractly) rule, or (concretely) a realm (literally or figuratively)
the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
10.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

11.gl: blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred

something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty) or motive; by extension, a computation; specially, (with the article in John) the Divine Expres
